_note: NATIVE PRESENTATION OVERLAY — the ONE hand-maintained input to scripts/gen-native-nav.ts. The web is the source of truth for the operator IA (which sections exist, their order/labels, which items, each item's href + label + requiredRole) — that is read live from src/admin-v3/nav.config.ts (NAV_SECTIONS_V3) and src/core/routes.ts (CORE_SURFACES). This file supplies ONLY the data that has no web equivalent: the SF Symbol per surface (the web uses lucide glyphs, which don't map 1:1), a one-line blurb, and the native render state (`live` = wired to /api/v1; `scaffold` = layout-parity pending facade coverage). The generator fails if a web surface is missing here (add it) or if an entry here points at an href the web nav no longer has (remove it). Edit this when the web adds/removes an operator surface, in the same change.

/core/pos.blurb: Counter & table orders, open checks, QR pay and settle.

/core/kds.blurb: Live ticket lanes — bump dishes from cooking to ready.

/core/orders.label: Orders
/core/orders.blurb: Every live order across fulfilment types, in one board.

/core/guest.blurb: Loyalty, guest profiles (CRM) and table bookings.

/core/service.blurb: Floor plan, table turns and reservation slots.

/core/service/book.label: Book
/core/service/book.blurb: Reservations & slots — book a table against the floor timeline.

/admin/welcome.blurb: Day-one tour and quick links into the operation.

/admin.blurb: Today's covers, revenue, prep load and live alerts at a glance.

/admin/orders.blurb: Operator order spine — filter, inspect, refund, recall.

/admin/alerts.blurb: Stock-outs, late tickets, SLA breaches and ops nudges.

/admin/comms/tasks.blurb: Shift checklists and assigned to-dos with sign-off.

/admin/comms/announcements.blurb: Broadcast notices to the floor and kitchen.

/admin/recipes.blurb: Chain-wide recipes & ingredient catalogue (one recipe per dish).

/admin/waste.blurb: Record spoilage and wastage against par.

/admin/handover.blurb: End-of-shift notes and open issues for the next lead.

/admin/inventory.blurb: On-hand counts, par levels and variance.

/admin/suppliers.blurb: Vendor catalogue, lead times and pricing.

/admin/purchase-orders.blurb: Raise, receive and reconcile POs against par.

/admin/staff.blurb: Team roster, roles and time punches.

/admin/customers.blurb: CRM — profiles, history, segments and consent.

/admin/feedback.blurb: Reviews and sentiment, with AI summaries.

/admin/surveys.blurb: Guest pulse surveys and response analytics.

/admin/reports.blurb: Sales, cohort, delivery, tips and JPK exports.

/admin/business-costs.blurb: Fixed & variable costs feeding margin maths.

/admin/simulation.blurb: What-if P&L simulator and break-even sandbox.

/admin/crosssell.blurb: Pairings — espresso + dessert with every pizza.

/admin/locations/manage.blurb: Open, edit and configure each location.

/admin/agent-hq.blurb: Autonomous ops agents and their work queue.

/admin/ai/agent.blurb: Conversational ops copilot over your data.

/admin/users.blurb: Staff accounts, roles, MFA and WebAuthn.

/admin/compliance.blurb: Recurring compliance tasks and due dates.

/admin/audit-log.blurb: Immutable trail of every privileged action.

/admin/qr-ordering.blurb: Table QR codes and at-table ordering.

/admin/settings.blurb: Brand, hours, fulfilment and loyalty configuration.
